'''zhajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jemmily|jemmily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jemmily|jemmily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhajate|zhajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhajatesher|zhajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajatesherĂ«m|zhajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhajatero|zhajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhajateshĂ«|zhajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajateshĂ«m|zhajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhajatero|gokizhajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhajateshĂ«|gokizhajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajateshĂ«m|gokizhajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhajankerom|gozhajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhajankeshĂ«|gozhajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhajankeshĂ«m|gozhajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhajankeya|gozhajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhajaterom|zhajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajatemu|zhajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhajateya|zhajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhajaterom|gokizhajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajatemu|gokizhajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhajateya|gokizhajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhajajate|zhajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhajajatesher|zhajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajajatesherĂ«m|zhajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhajajatero|zhajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhajajateshĂ«|zhajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajajateshĂ«m|zhajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhajajatero|gokizhajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhajajateshĂ«|gokizhajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajajateshĂ«m|gokizhajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhajajankerom|gozhajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhajajankeshĂ«|gozhajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhajajankeshĂ«m|gozhajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhajajankeya|gozhajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhajajaterom|zhajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajajatemu|zhajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhajajateya|zhajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhajajaterom|gokizhajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajajatemu|gokizhajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhajajateya|gokizhajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠte|zhĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠtesher|zhĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠtero|zhĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠjĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠterom|zhĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠtemu|zhĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠjĂŠteya|zhĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠjĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠjĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafjafte|zhafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafjaftesher|zhafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafjaftesherĂ«m|zhafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafjaftero|zhafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafjafteshĂ«|zhafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafjafteshĂ«m|zhafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafjaftero|gokizhafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafjafteshĂ«|gokizhafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafjafteshĂ«m|gokizhafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafjafnkerom|gozhafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafjafnkeshĂ«|gozhafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafjafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafjafnkeya|gozhafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafjafterom|zhafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafjaftemu|zhafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafjafteya|zhafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafjafterom|gokizhafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafjaftemu|gokizhafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafjafteya|gokizhafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
